# MorseAI — AI-Powered Morse Code Translator

> MorseAI is a free, browser-based tool that uses AI speech recognition to convert
> voice recordings and audio files directly into Morse code. No registration required.
> Built for amateur radio enthusiasts, educators, escape room designers, and hobbyists.

## Pages

- [Translator](https://ai-morse-code-translator.loveyouall.qzz.io/): Main tool — upload audio or record voice to get Morse code output with playback and export.
- [About](https://ai-morse-code-translator.loveyouall.qzz.io/about): Features overview, use cases, Morse code character reference table, history timeline, and tech stack.
- [FAQ](https://ai-morse-code-translator.loveyouall.qzz.io/faq): 26 answered questions across 5 categories — Getting Started, Audio, Morse Code, Features, Privacy.

## What MorseAI Does

MorseAI accepts spoken audio (microphone or uploaded file) and produces:
- International Morse code text output (dots, dashes, word separators)
- Audible Morse tone playback at adjustable WPM (5–40 words per minute)
- Visual signal lamp that blinks the Morse pattern
- Downloadable .wav audio file of the Morse signal
- Exportable results as .txt, .csv, or .xlsx

## Core Workflow

1. Upload an audio file (.wav .mp3 .m4a .ogg, max 3MB) **or** click "Start Record" to use your microphone
2. AI speech recognition transcribes your audio to text (powered by Deepgram)
3. The text is converted to Morse code using the ITU-R M.1677 international standard
4. Play as audio tone, watch as visual lamp signal, or export in multiple formats

## Key Features

- **Voice-to-Morse**: Record up to 30 seconds of speech → instant Morse code
- **Audio Upload**: Accepts WAV, MP3, M4A, OGG files up to 3MB
- **Reverse Translation**: Paste Morse code (dots and dashes) → get original text
- **Batch Translation**: Import .txt, .csv, .xls, .xlsx files → translate all rows at once
- **WPM Control**: Adjustable playback speed from 5 to 40 words per minute
- **WAV Export**: Download the Morse signal as a standard WAV audio file
- **Visual Lamp**: Watch Morse code as a blinking light signal
- **Learning Mode**: Practice decoding random Morse code characters (A–Z, 0–9)
- **Punctuation Support**: Full ITU-R standard including . , ? ! / ( ) & : ; = + - " @ '

## Supported Character Set

Letters: A–Z (26 characters)
Digits: 0–9 (10 characters)
Punctuation: . , ? ! / ( ) & : ; = + - _ " @ ' (17 characters)
Standard: ITU-R M.1677 International Morse Code

## Morse Code Reference

- Dot (dit): shortest signal unit
- Dash (dah): 3× the duration of a dot
- Letter gap: 3 dots of silence between characters
- Word gap: 7 dots of silence between words (represented as " / " in text output)

## Use Cases

- **Amateur Radio (Ham Radio)**: Practice CW (continuous wave) Morse communication
- **Learning**: Decode random character challenges with built-in Learning Mode
- **Escape Rooms**: Generate Morse code puzzles with audio output
- **ARG (Alternate Reality Games)**: Encode messages as audio or light signals
- **Education**: Demonstrate Morse code in classroom settings
- **Accessibility**: Alternative communication encoding/decoding

## Technology Stack

- React 18 SPA with Vite build system
- Deepgram Nova-2 model for AI speech-to-text transcription
- Web Audio API for real-time Morse tone synthesis
- Cloudflare Workers for serverless API backend

## Pricing

Free. No account, no registration, no rate limits for end users.

## URL

https://ai-morse-code-translator.loveyouall.qzz.io/
